message:
feat(abi): extend host_resolve with pthread/malloc symbols and integrate across ABI modules

Expand the raw ELF host symbol resolver to cover the complete set of
interposed functions, eliminating recursive dlsym re-interposition.

host_resolve.rs:
- Add pthread_self, pthread_equal, malloc, calloc, realloc, free
- Extract load_host_symbol() helper

dlfcn_abi.rs:
- Add bootstrap_passthrough_active() fast path for dlopen/dlsym/dlvsym/dlclose

malloc_abi.rs:
- Attempt resolved host symbols first before fallback

pthread_abi.rs / startup_abi.rs:
- Integrate extended host symbol set

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
